templates.descriptionTemplate: Complete the guided practice for Class {classLabel}, review the chapter work, and bring your notebook for checking.
Revise the key ideas covered this week for Class {classLabel}. Students should finish the worksheet neatly and be ready for discussion in the next period.

As part of the continuous evaluation for {classLabel}, students are required to prepare a research project on the current {subject} chapter. Please structure your report with an introduction, methodology, and conclusion.
To keep in touch with {subject} over the holidays, please complete the assigned exercises. Ensure your handwriting is legible and submit it on the first day back.
Read the upcoming chapter ahead of the next {subject} class for {classLabel}. Highlight key vocabulary and prepare two questions to ask the teacher.
Based on our recent practical session, compile the observations, draw the necessary diagrams, and write the conclusion in your {subject} lab manual.
There will be a short oral and written quiz in the upcoming {subject} period for {classLabel}. Prepare topics taught from Monday to Wednesday.
Complete all the long-answer and short-answer questions given at the end of the current {subject} chapter in your fair notebook.
